instruction: What changes have been made to Proximity Mine Launcher across Terraria updates?
output:
- Desktop 1.4.0.1: Now does 3× damage when mines are stationary, normal damage when they are still moving.
- Use time increased from 40 to 50.
- Reduced the number of mines that can be active at once.
- Desktop 1.3.0.1: Damage increased from 45 to 80.
- Use time increased from 30 to 40.
- Desktop 1.2: Introduced.
- Console 1.02: Introduced.
- Switch 1.0.711.6: Introduced.
- Mobile 1.2.6508: Introduced.
- 3DS-Release: Introduced. (applies to: PC/Desktop, Mobile, Console, 3DS (legacy))

For more information, see: https://terraria.wiki.gg/wiki/Proximity_Mine_Launcher
